# zstack_vpc_firewall (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage VPC firewalls in ZStack. A VPC firewall provides security and traffic filtering for a VPC.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the VPC firewall.
- `vpc_uuid` (String) The UUID of the VPC.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the VPC firewall.

### Read-Only

- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the VPC firewall.
